invoices.eventLocation: There's another requirement here regarding what the admin needs. When the admin is in the "Select Services & Packages" section and specifying what the customer gets with the wedding shoot—such as an album—selecting "Album" should prompt fields for details like the album size and number of sheets (the price doesn't need to be shown). Similarly, if the admin selects "Video," there should be fields for details like the video duration (in hours) and whether the customer provides the pen drive or we supply it. Furthermore, if "Cinematic" is selected, there should be options to specify the duration of the cinematic video and the number of reels included. That is the kind of functionality required.
